name: Hamburger Hash Brown Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 lb. package of frozen hash browns, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Press the thawed hash browns into a greased 9-inch pie plate or quiche pan; brush with melted butter. Bake for 10 minutes while preparing the meat filling.
2. Brown the ground beef and onion in a skillet until drained.
3. Combine milk, beaten eggs, and cornstarch in a bowl.
4. Stir the egg mixture into the meat along with the cheese, salt, pepper, and Worcestershire sauce.
5. Pour the filling into the hash brown crust.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes.
